Variables.Name: IncludeRenderPasses
Variables.Description: A list of render passes to include in the capture. Leave empty to export all available passes.

Variables.Name: bCaptureFramesInHDR
Variables.Description: Whether to capture the frames as HDR textures (.exr format)

Variables.Name: HDRCompressionQuality
Variables.Description: Compression Quality for HDR Frames (0 for no compression, 1 for default compression which can be slow)

Variables.Name: CaptureGamut
Variables.Description: The color gamut to use when storing HDR captured data. The gamut depends on whether the bCaptureFramesInHDR option is enabled.

Variables.Name: PostProcessingMaterial
Variables.Description: Custom post processing material to use for rendering
